resources.string: Start your journey with SAA 2025. Log in to explore!
Couldn\'t connect. Please check your internet and try again.

Livestreamed at the Sun* Family Facebook Group
The Top Talent Award honours individuals who excel across every dimension.

Recognition and thank-you activities for colleagues — for the first time available to every Sunner. Launching November 2025, this campaign encourages Sunners to share recognition and thanks with their teammates on the platform announced by the organising committee. The Heads Council will reference these messages when selecting award recipients.

More than just a name, "Root Further" is the spirit every Sunner aspires to: always seeing deeper in every context and continuously creating, expanding beyond the limits we once set for ourselves. Borrowing the metaphor of color theory — from just three primaries (red, yellow, blue), individual creativity can spawn an almost infinite range of hues, each shade representing a breakthrough and limitless invention.
Couldn\'t load awards. Please try again.
